positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical graphic illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The central subject is a cluster of bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate fireflies, forming an ethereal canopy. Deep blues, vibrant emerald greens, and pops of warm orange and gold dominate the palette. The style should be reminiscent of modern gothic fairy art mixed with minimalist screen printing graphics, featuring thick, clean silhouettes and high-contrast elements against a deep midnight background. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed to repeat seamlessly, ensuring crisp edges and strong visual impact on fabric. No realistic photo elements; exclusively graphic vectors and stylized shapes. Minimal shading, relying on contour and solid color blocks.
